item.content:encoded:
AI Open Source Trends 2026-04-06

Sources: GitHub Trending + GitHub Search API | Generated: 2026-04-06 00:11 UTC

AI Open Source Trends Report — April 6, 2026

Step 1: Filtered AI/ML Projects

Excluded from trending list: openscreen (demo tool), telegramdesktop (messaging app), freeCodeCamp (education platform). All 80 topic search results retained as AI-relevant.

1. Today's Highlights

Today's GitHub trending reveals explosive momentum around on-device AI and agentic development tools. Google's LiteRT-LM and gallery signal major investment in mobile/edge ML deployment. block/goose and badlogic/pi-mono demonstrate the rapid maturation of AI coding agents beyond simple autocomplete—now handling full software lifecycle tasks. The shareAI-lab/learn-claude-code phenomenon (48K+ stars) shows intense community interest in lightweight agent harnesses. Meanwhile, dmtrKovalenko/fff.nvim highlights infrastructure optimization for AI agent file operations, indicating agents are becoming performance-critical workloads.

2. Top Projects by Category

🔧 AI Infrastructure

Project Stars Description
google-ai-edge/LiteRT-LM +124 today Google's next-gen runtime for on-device LLM inference—critical for mobile AI deployment
google-ai-edge/gallery +389 today Showcase and testing platform for on-device ML/GenAI use cases
Blaizzy/mlx-vlm +416 today Apple Silicon-optimized vision-language model inference via MLX
dmtrKovalenko/fff.nvim +76 today Ultra-fast file search toolkit designed specifically for AI agent workloads
vllm-project/vllm 75,366 High-throughput LLM serving engine; production standard for inference
ollama/ollama 167,309 Local LLM runtime with broad model support; community favorite for edge deployment
langchain-ai/langchain 132,458 Foundational agent engineering platform; ecosystem backbone

🤖 AI Agents / Workflows

Project Stars Description
block/goose +882 today Extensible AI agent executing full dev workflows—install, edit, test, execute
shareAI-lab/learn-claude-code 48,606 "Bash is all you need"—minimalist agent harness from 0→1, capturing Claude Code essence
badlogic/pi-mono +355 today Comprehensive agent toolkit: CLI coding agent, unified LLM API, TUI/web libraries
CherryHQ/cherry-studio 42,975 AI productivity studio with 300+ assistants and autonomous agent capabilities
activepieces/activepieces 21,582 AI workflow automation with ~400 MCP servers for agent tool integration
trycua/cua 13,391 Open infrastructure for computer-use agents—full desktop control across OSes
browser-use/browser-use 86,132 Makes websites accessible to AI agents; web automation primitive
Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT 183,164 Pioneer autonomous agent framework; continuous evolution toward accessibility

📦 AI Applications

Project Stars Description
onyx-dot-app/onyx +998 today Enterprise AI chat platform with advanced features across all LLMs
zhayujie/chatgpt-on-wechat 42,780 Multi-platform AI assistant (WeChat, DingTalk, etc.) with active task planning
googleworkspace/cli 23,871 Google Workspace CLI with built-in AI agent skills for enterprise automation
saturndec/waoowaoo 10,842 Industry-first professional AI platform for controllable film/video production
OpenBB-finance/OpenBB 65,425 Financial data platform built for analysts, quants, and AI agents
netdata/netdata 78,324 AI-powered full-stack observability for lean teams

🧠 LLMs / Training

Project Stars Description
jingyaogong/minimind 45,714 Train 64M-parameter GPT from scratch in 2 hours—democratizing LLM education
rasbt/LLMs-from-scratch 90,053 Implement ChatGPT-like LLM step-by-step; foundational learning resource
hiyouga/LlamaFactory 69,563 Unified efficient fine-tuning for 100+ LLMs/VLMs (ACL 2024)
tensorflow/tensorflow 194,482 Enduring ML framework; ecosystem foundation
pytorch/pytorch 98,817 Dynamic neural networks with strong GPU acceleration; research standard
huggingface/transformers 158,842 State-of-the-art model definitions across modalities; inference and training
0xPlaygrounds/rig 6,794 Modular LLM applications in Rust—emerging systems language for AI

🔍 RAG / Knowledge

Project Stars Description
infiniflow/ragflow 77,185 Leading RAG engine fusing retrieval with agent capabilities
mem0ai/mem0 52,035 Universal memory layer for AI agents—persistence primitive
milvus-io/milvus 43,610 Cloud-native vector database for scalable ANN search
qdrant/qdrant 30,049 High-performance vector database for next-gen AI applications
topoteretes/cognee 14,955 Knowledge engine for AI agent memory—6 lines of code integration
VectifyAI/PageIndex 24,224 Document indexing for vectorless, reasoning-based RAG
HKUDS/LightRAG 32,287 Simple and fast RAG (EMNLP 2025)—efficiency breakthrough
yichuan-w/LEANN 10,642 97% storage savings for private on-device RAG (MLsys 2026)

3. Trend Signal Analysis

Explosive Attention: Agent Infrastructure & "Claude Code Clones"

The dominant pattern today is agent harness minimalism competing with full-stack agent platforms. shareAI-lab/learn-claude-code's 48K+ stars demonstrate massive demand for stripped-down, understandable agent implementations—developers want to understand the magic, not just use it. This parallels the "nano GPT" educational trend but applied to agent architectures.

Simultaneously, block/goose (+882 today) and badlogic/pi-mono show production-grade agents maturing beyond proof-of-concept, with explicit support for software lifecycle operations (install, test, execute). The "agent as IDE" pattern is consolidating.

New Tech Stack Emergence: MCP & On-Device

Three technical directions appear newly prominent:

  1. MCP (Model Context Protocol) proliferation: activepieces/activepieces explicitly cites "~400 MCP servers," indicating MCP has become the de facto agent-tool integration standard.

  2. Apple Silicon optimization: Blaizzy/mlx-vlm leverages MLX for VLMs, while yichuan-w/LEANN targets on-device RAG—Apple's ML stack is becoming a distinct optimization target.

  3. Rust for AI infrastructure: dmtrKovalenko/fff.nvim, 0xPlaygrounds/rig, and qdrant/qdrant signal Rust's growing role in performance-critical AI components.

Industry Connection

These trends align with recent Claude Code/Codex releases and Google's Gemma/Edge AI push. The community is rapidly absorbing "agentic" interfaces into developer tooling, while Google's LiteRT-LM suggests on-device LLM competition is intensifying beyond Qualcomm and Apple.

4. Community Hot Spots

  • block/goose — Square's open agent with 882 stars today signals enterprise-grade agent tooling entering mainstream; worth watching for architectural patterns in "agent as teammate" workflows.

  • shareAI-lab/learn-claude-code — Educational agent harness with massive traction; likely to spawn derivative implementations and become a reference architecture for custom agents.

  • dmtrKovalenko/fff.nvim — Specialized infrastructure for AI agent file operations indicates agents are hitting performance bottlenecks requiring dedicated tooling; niche but directionally significant.

  • yichuan-w/LEANN — 97% storage reduction for on-device RAG at MLsys 2026; privacy-preserving, efficient local AI is a clear next frontier.

  • activepieces/activepieces — ~400 MCP servers make this the most concrete evidence of MCP ecosystem scale; critical for understanding emerging agent-tool standards.

item.content:encoded:
AI Open Source Trends 2026-04-05

Sources: GitHub Trending + GitHub Search API | Generated: 2026-04-05 00:11 UTC

AI Open Source Trends Report — April 5, 2026

1. Today's Highlights

Today's GitHub trending reveals explosive interest in AI agent infrastructure and developer tooling, with three agent-related projects (oh-my-codex, openscreen, goose) dominating new star counts. The standout is OmX (oh-my-codex) at +1,789 stars, signaling massive demand for extensible "agent harnesses" that augment coding assistants with hooks, teams, and HUDs. Microsoft's entry into the agent framework space with agent-framework confirms enterprise validation of multi-agent orchestration. Meanwhile, mlx-vlm's strong debut (+343 stars) shows continued appetite for Apple Silicon-optimized AI tooling. The pattern is clear: developers want composable, local-first AI agents that go beyond chat to execute real workflows.

2. Top Projects by Category

🔧 AI Infrastructure

Project Stars Description
Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-codex ⭐0 (+1,789 today) OmX — Extensible "agent harness" for coding assistants; adds hooks, agent teams, and HUDs to Claude Code/Codex. Today's breakout star.
block/goose ⭐0 (+935 today) Extensible AI agent by Block (Square) that installs, executes, edits, and tests code — goes beyond suggestions to full autonomous operation.
siddharthvaddem/openscreen ⭐0 (+1,591 today) Free, open-source demo creation tool — AI-powered screen recording alternative to Screen Studio, no watermarks or subscriptions.
shareAI-lab/learn-claude-code ⭐48,229 "Bash is all you need" — nano Claude Code-like agent harness built from scratch, educational and extensible.
jackwener/opencli ⭐13,008 Universal CLI Hub transforming any website/app into standardized CLI for AI agents via AGENT.md protocol.
e2b-dev/E2B ⭐11,581 Secure sandbox environment with real-world tools for enterprise-grade agents.

🤖 AI Agents / Workflows

Project Stars Description
microsoft/agent-framework ⭐0 (+72 today) Microsoft's official framework for building, orchestrating and deploying multi-agent workflows — Python and .NET support signals enterprise ambition.
CherryHQ/cherry-studio ⭐42,911 AI productivity studio with smart chat, autonomous agents, and 300+ assistants — unified access to frontier LLMs.
zhayujie/chatgpt-on-wechat ⭐42,756 CowAgent — super AI assistant with active thinking, task planning, OS access, and multi-platform integration (WeChat, Lark, DingTalk, QQ).
CopilotKit/CopilotKit ⭐29,981 Frontend stack for agents & generative UI — React/Angular support, creators of AG-UI Protocol.
activepieces/activepieces ⭐21,566 AI workflow automation with ~400 MCP servers — bridges AI agents with external tools via Model Context Protocol.
trycua/cua ⭐13,379 Open-source infrastructure for Computer-Use Agents — sandboxes, SDKs, and benchmarks for desktop-controlling agents.
NousResearch/hermes-agent ⭐24,962 "The agent that grows with you" — adaptive personal AI agent from leading open-source research collective.

📦 AI Applications

Project Stars Description
onyx-dot-app/onyx ⭐0 (+1,197 today) Open-source AI platform with advanced chat features working with every LLM — today's second-highest trending AI project.
Blaizzy/mlx-vlm ⭐0 (+343 today) Vision Language Model inference and fine-tuning on Apple Silicon via MLX — local-first multimodal AI for Mac users.
iOfficeAI/AionUi ⭐20,991 Free, local, open-source 24/7 cowork app and OpenClaw interface for multiple CLI coding agents (Gemini, Claude, Codex, Goose, etc.).
saturndec/waoowaoo ⭐10,813 Industry-first professional AI agent platform for controllable film & video production — Hollywood-standard workflows.
Panniantong/Agent-Reach ⭐15,075 Gives AI agents "eyes" to see the entire internet — read/search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili with zero API fees.

🧠 LLMs / Training

Project Stars Description
jingyaogong/minimind ⭐45,622 Train a 64M-parameter GPT from scratch in 2 hours — educational minimalism meets practical implementation.
hiyouga/LlamaFactory ⭐69,521 Unified efficient fine-tuning of 100+ LLMs & VLMs (ACL 2024) — the standard for accessible model customization.
vllm-project/vllm ⭐75,260 High-throughput, memory-efficient inference engine — production serving infrastructure for LLMs.
ollama/ollama ⭐167,168 Get up and running with latest models (Kimi-K2.5, GLM-5, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma) locally.
rasbt/LLMs-from-scratch ⭐89,971 Implement ChatGPT-like LLM in PyTorch step by step — foundational educational resource.
0xPlaygrounds/rig ⭐6,781 Build modular and scalable LLM applications in Rust — systems programming meets AI.

🔍 RAG / Knowledge

Project Stars Description
langgenius/dify ⭐135,921 Production-ready platform for agentic workflow development — the leading open LLM app development platform.
infiniflow/ragflow ⭐77,120 Leading open-source RAG engine fusing cutting-edge retrieval with Agent capabilities.
mem0ai/mem0 ⭐51,972 Universal memory layer for AI agents — persistent, contextual memory across sessions.
thedotmack/claude-mem ⭐45,174 Claude Code plugin capturing and compressing session history with AI, injecting relevant context into future sessions.
milvus-io/milvus ⭐43,600 High-performance cloud-native vector database for scalable ANN search.
meilisearch/meilisearch ⭐56,954 Lightning-fast search engine API with AI-powered hybrid search.
topoteretes/cognee ⭐14,933 Knowledge engine for AI agent memory in 6 lines of code — graph-based memory system.

3. Trend Signal Analysis

Explosive Category: Agent Infrastructure & "Harness" Tools

Today's data reveals a clear inflection point: developers are racing to build meta-layers around existing AI coding assistants. The +1,789 stars for oh-my-codex and strong performance of learn-claude-code demonstrate that the community wants composable, extensible "agent harnesses" — not just better models, but better containers for model interaction. These tools add hooks, team coordination, memory persistence, and heads-up displays to Claude Code, Codex, and similar tools.

New Tech Stack Emergence: Rust + Agent Infrastructure

Notably, block/goose (Rust, +935 stars) and rig (Rust, 6,781 stars) signal Rust's growing role in AI infrastructure — offering memory safety and performance for agent runtimes. This complements Python's dominance in ML with systems-level reliability for production agent deployment.

MCP (Model Context Protocol) Goes Mainstream

activepieces/activepieces explicitly highlights "~400 MCP servers," indicating the Model Context Protocol — Anthropic's open standard for connecting AI assistants to external tools — is achieving rapid ecosystem adoption. MCP appears to be becoming the "USB-C for AI agents."

Connection to Industry Events

This surge aligns with recent releases: Claude 4 (anticipated/recent), OpenAI's Codex CLI, and Google's Gemini CLI have created a fragmented landscape of coding agents. The trending projects solve the resulting pain point: unification and extensibility. AionUi's positioning as "OpenClaw for Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Qwen Code, Goose CLI" explicitly addresses this fragmentation. Microsoft's agent-framework entry validates that enterprise orchestration of multiple agents is now a strategic priority.

4. Community Hot Spots

  • oh-my-codex — Today's breakout with +1,789 stars; defines the "agent harness" pattern. Worth studying for architecture of extensible AI tooling layers.

  • microsoft/agent-framework — Enterprise-grade multi-agent orchestration from Microsoft. Early signal of how big tech is positioning for agent ecosystems; Python + .NET dual support indicates serious production intent.

  • block/goose — Block's (Square/Cash App) open agent goes beyond code suggestions to full execution. Financial services backing suggests rigorous security/execution standards; watch for enterprise adoption patterns.

  • Agent-Reach — "Zero API fees" internet access for agents. Addresses critical cost barrier in agent deployment; could democratize web-enabled agents.

  • claude-mem — AI-compressed session memory for Claude Code. Solves the "fresh start" problem in coding assistants; pattern likely to spread across agent tools.

Report generated from GitHub trending data — April 5, 2026

item.content:encoded:
AI Open Source Trends 2026-04-04

Sources: GitHub Trending + GitHub Search API | Generated: 2026-04-04 00:10 UTC

AI Open Source Trends Report — April 4, 2026

Step 1: Filter Applied

Excluded from trending: openscreen (demo creation tool, non-AI core), fff.nvim (general file search), sherlock (OSINT tool). Retained 5 AI-relevant trending repos + 80 topic-search results.

1. Today's Highlights

Oh My codeX explodes with 3,047 stars—developers are racing to extend GitHub's Codex CLI with hooks, agent teams, and HUDs, signaling massive appetite for "agent harness" customization. Google's TimesFM time-series foundation model gains 916 stars, showing enterprise demand for specialized non-NLP foundation models. Onyx (1,852 stars) and prompts.chat (375 stars) highlight dual momentum: enterprise-ready AI platforms and grassroots prompt engineering communities. The Rust-powered fff.nvim—though general-purpose—reflects infrastructure performance obsession for AI agent tooling. Together, these reveal a market bifurcated between polished enterprise suites and hacker-friendly agent extensibility layers.

2. Top Projects by Category

🔧 AI Infrastructure

Project Stars Why It Matters Today
ollama/ollama 167,021 Local LLM runtime now supporting Kimi-K2.5, GLM-5, MiniMax—expanding beyond Western models for global deployment
vllm-project/vllm 75,180 High-throughput inference engine; critical infrastructure as model serving costs dominate AI budgets
dmtrKovalenko/fff.nvim 0 (+750 today) Rust-powered file search optimized for AI agents—sub-millisecond latency for agent context retrieval
langchain-ai/langchain 132,260 "Agent engineering platform" rebrand signals pivot from chains to autonomous agent orchestration
0xPlaygrounds/rig 6,772 Modular Rust LLM framework—Rust's memory safety meets AI infrastructure demands

🤖 AI Agents / Workflows

Project Stars Why It Matters Today
Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-codex 0 (+3,047 today) Top gainer: Codex CLI supercharger with hooks, teams, HUDs—"Oh My Zsh for AI coding"
Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT 183,120 Reborn as accessible AI platform; 183K stars show sustained autonomous agent interest
langgenius/dify 135,664 "Production-ready agentic workflow"—enterprise visual builder competing with proprietary platforms
browser-use/browser-use 85,893 Web automation for agents; critical primitive as agents need real-world tool access
shareAI-lab/learn-claude-code 47,864 Educational "nano claude code" implementation—democratizing agent harness internals
activepieces/activepieces 21,543 ~400 MCP servers for AI agents—MCP (Model Context Protocol) ecosystem acceleration
trycua/cua 13,374 Computer-Use Agent infrastructure: sandboxes, SDKs, benchmarks for desktop-controlling agents

📦 AI Applications

Project Stars Why It Matters Today
onyx-dot-app/onyx 0 (+1,852 today) Enterprise AI platform—"works with every LLM" positioning captures multi-model enterprise strategy
open-webui/open-webui 129,906 User-friendly AI interface; 129K stars prove UX layer critical for LLM adoption
CherryHQ/cherry-studio 42,865 300+ assistants, unified frontier LLM access—personal AI productivity consolidation
zhayujie/chatgpt-on-wechat 42,739 CowAgent: "lighter than OpenClaw"—Chinese market's preferred agent deployment
saturndec/waoowaoo 10,795 Industrial AI film/video production—Hollywood-grade agent workflows for creative vertical

🧠 LLMs / Training

Project Stars Why It Matters Today
google-research/timesfm 0 (+916 today) Google's time-series foundation model—expanding foundation model scope beyond language
huggingface/transformers 158,762 Definitive model framework; multimodal expansion (vision, audio) keeps it central
rasbt/LLMs-from-scratch 89,916 Educational PyTorch implementation—educational depth as competitive moat
jingyaogong/minimind 45,531 2-hour 64M-parameter GPT training—democratizing LLM training for experimentation
hiyouga/LlamaFactory 69,468 100+ LLMs/VLMs unified fine-tuning—efficiency essential as model diversity explodes

🔍 RAG / Knowledge

Project Stars Why It Matters Today
infiniflow/ragflow 77,053 "RAG + Agent capabilities"—knowledge retrieval evolving into active agent context
mem0ai/mem0 51,888 Universal memory layer—solving agent state persistence across sessions
run-llama/llama_index 48,273 "Document agent and OCR platform"—RAG vendor pivot to agent-centric positioning
milvus-io/milvus 43,590 Cloud-native vector DB; scalability as enterprise RAG default
thedotmack/claude-mem 44,946 Claude Code memory plugin—agent session continuity via AI-compressed context
VectifyAI/PageIndex 23,893 "Vectorless, reasoning-based RAG"—challenging embedding-heavy paradigms

3. Trend Signal Analysis

Explosive Category: "Agent Harness" Extensibility

Today's 3,047-star surge for oh-my-codex reveals a critical inflection: developers don't want black-box AI coding tools—they want composable, hackable agent infrastructure. This mirrors the 2010s DevOps transformation where "infrastructure as code" replaced proprietary tooling. The pattern repeats across learn-claude-code (47,864 stars, educational agent harness), everything-claude-code (136,058 stars, performance optimization system), and claude-mem (44,946 stars, memory persistence).

New Tech Stack Emergence: MCP (Model Context Protocol)

activepieces/activepieces explicitly markets "~400 MCP servers for AI agents"—MCP, Anthropic's open protocol for model-tool integration, is becoming the "USB-C for AI agents." This standardization wave enables the jackwener/opencli vision: "Make Any Website & Tool Your CLI" via unified AGENT.md integration.

Industry Event Connection: GitHub Codex CLI Launch Fallout

The timing aligns with GitHub's recent Codex CLI release. Rather than accepting GitHub's defaults, the community immediately built extension ecosystems—oh-my-codex for customization, ralph-claude-code for autonomous loops, AionUi as unified Cowork app. This mirrors VS Code's extension economy genesis.

Vertical Specialization Signal

google-research/timesfm (time-series) and waoowaoo (film production) demonstrate foundation models and agent workflows penetrating domain-specific verticals beyond general chat—enterprise and creative industries respectively.

4. Community Hot Spots

  • oh-my-codex — Highest velocity today (3,047 stars). The "Oh My Zsh for Codex" positioning suggests a new category: shell ecosystem for AI agents. Watch for plugin marketplace emergence.

  • onyx — Enterprise "works with every LLM" strategy captures multi-model procurement reality. 1,852 stars indicate strong product-market fit for vendor-agnostic AI platforms.

  • timesfm — Google's time-series foundation model signals enterprise AI moving beyond chatbots to operational forecasting. Critical for supply chain, finance, IoT applications.

  • PageIndex — "Vectorless, reasoning-based RAG" challenges the embedding-heavy status quo. If proven at scale, could disrupt $B vector database market with pure reasoning approaches.

  • cua + OpenSandbox — Computer-Use Agent infrastructure race intensifies. Sandboxed desktop environments for agents becoming critical primitive; Alibaba's entry signals Chinese market acceleration.

Report generated from GitHub trending data, April 4, 2026. Star counts reflect snapshot timing; velocity indicators prioritize today's new stars where available.

This digest is auto-generated by agents-radar.
